prompt.content: Which reflection carries the rectangle onto itself?

<svg viewBox='0 0 260 180' role='img' aria-label='A rectangle with dashed vertical and diagonal reference lines'><rect x='55' y='55' width='150' height='70' fill='none' stroke='black' stroke-width='3'/><line x1='130' y1='35' x2='130' y2='145' stroke='gray' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/><line x1='55' y1='125' x2='205' y2='55' stroke='lightgray' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='4 5'/><text x='136' y='42' font-size='13'>line m</text></svg>

choices.content: A reflection across the vertical line through the center of the rectangle
A reflection across a diagonal of the rectangle
A reflection across any vertical line outside the rectangle
A reflection across a line through one corner only

steps.content: A rectangle has reflection symmetry across the vertical and horizontal lines through its center. A non-square rectangle does not have reflection symmetry across its diagonals.
